headline: Palantir Expands Its Presence in Mexico and Strengthens Its AI Offering in the Insurance Sector with GNP Seguros
summary: MIAMI, July 07, 2026--Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) announced today an enterprise expansion agreement with GNP Seguros (Grupo Nacional Provincial), the largest insurer in Mexico and part of the prominent Grupo BAL consortium. This alliance marks a milestone for Palantir, as GNP Seguros becomes Palantir’s first publicly announced commercial customer in Latin America.
